HERO.NAME: José Luis López Pérez
HERO.SUBTITLE: End-to-end software development. Dynamic interfaces, microservices, vector databases, and Artificial Intelligence integration.

ABOUT.TITLE: Professional Profile
ABOUT.BIO: Full Stack Developer and Systems Engineer with experience in building end-to-end software. Versatile technical profile ranging from the creation of dynamic interfaces in Angular and React, to backend robustness with Spring Boot and Node.js. Passionate about architectural innovation, with real experience implementing microservice architectures, on-premise infrastructure, and data contextualization for AI models. Self-driven learner with strong analytical thinking and adaptability to solve complex software engineering challenges.

COPPEL.DESC1: AI Development: Integration of AI capabilities through the design and contextualization of vector databases using pgvector, increasing retrieval accuracy.
COPPEL.DESC2: Agile Methodologies at Scale: Active collaboration within the SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework), planning and incrementally delivering business-critical features in cross-functional teams.
COPPEL.DESC3: Optimization & Support: Maintenance and optimization of legacy systems, quickly adapting to complex business rules and enterprise architectural standards.

GAMAN.DESC1: Full Stack Development & Value Delivery: End-to-End implementation of new business features, translating frontend requirements in Angular to backend logic in Express.
GAMAN.DESC2: Database Performance Tuning: Response time reduction by refactoring queries in SQL Server and Sequelize, alongside strategic indexing.
GAMAN.DESC3: Corrective Maintenance & Stability: Effective diagnosis and resolution of bugs in critical existing modules, securing operational continuity.

CLARITI.DESC1: Full Stack Dev & Critical Optimization: Led the refactoring of search queries and database normalization, cutting down response times from 7s to under 1s.
CLARITI.DESC2: Process Automation: Designed and deployed a Node.js cron microservice to automate late payment charges, sanitizing and migrating over 16,000 records.
